mapper.sql: id, case_no, supplier_case_id, order_id, order_no, user_id, supplier_id, product_id, type, description, solution, photos, supplier_opinion, status, review_status, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_aftersales (case_no, supplier_case_id, order_id, order_no, user_id, supplier_id, product_id, type, description, solution, photos, supplier_opinion, status, review_status, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{caseNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierCaseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{solution, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{photos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierOpinion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_aftersales (case_no, supplier_case_id, order_id, order_no, user_id, supplier_id, product_id, type, description, solution, photos, supplier_opinion, status, review_status, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.caseNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.supplierCaseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.solution, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.photos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.supplierOpinion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reviewStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_aftersales WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM client_aftersales WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE client_aftersales SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE client_aftersales SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
